---
title: "Projects"
---

Here are some projects of mine:

[R portfolio](https://github.com/Tallex0/STAT331_portfolio_template)

*Note: go to supporting_artifacts -> continued_learning -> revisions to see the work


[One Number Story](https://cpslo-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/g/personal/agoodm09_calpoly_edu/EbPCHD4paoVOnhr7_hMUFboBeODPtdxdzG2F3C5enblRag?e=SeoBeR)

[Copy the Masters](https://acrobat.adobe.com/link/review?uri=urn:aaid:scds:US:2bab30ad-a729-3854-b3bc-e5169404b7be)
